title: C360SourceVsStatus
description: Payload for Source vs Status widget — compliance distribution across source types by backend-native status values (e.g. not_started, in_progress, resolved, accepted). Groups data by Source Type Name, computes per-source status counts and percents, and ranks source types by unresolved rate.

status.description: Compliance status as returned by backend (e.g. not_started, in_progress, resolved, accepted)

count.description: Count of compliances in this status for the source type

percent.description: Pre-computed: (count / sourceTotal) × 100, rounded to 1 decimal. Empty string when sourceTotal = 0.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this payload was generated

sourceStatusDistribution.description: Category 1: compliance counts per source type broken down by backend-native status. Sorted by totalCompliances descending. Unresolved statuses = not_started, in_progress, pending (any non-resolved/accepted/closed status).

items.description: Source types sorted by totalCompliances descending (up to top 5)

sourceTypeName.description: Source type name as returned by backend (e.g. EWS Quater 1, IIFLC360New)

totalCompliances.description: Total count of compliances for this source type in the selected period

statusBreakdown.description: All statuses present for this source type with counts and percents

topUnresolvedSources.description: Category 2: top 3 source types with the highest unresolved compliance rate. Unresolved = count of compliances in not_started + in_progress + pending statuses. Sorted by unresolvedPercent descending.

items.description: Top 3 source types by unresolvedPercent descending

sourceTypeName.description: Source type name as returned by backend

unresolvedCount.description: Pre-computed: sum of counts for not_started + in_progress + pending statuses

totalCompliances.description: Total compliances for this source type

unresolvedPercent.description: Pre-computed: (unresolvedCount / totalCompliances) × 100, rounded to 1 decimal. Empty string when totalCompliances = 0.
